metadata.name: ww-input-rich-text
metadata.description: A rich text / WYSIWYG editor input based on Tiptap. Outputs HTML or Markdown and can be used standalone or as a form input.
features: Configurable toolbar (bold, italic, headings, lists, alignment, tables, code, math, etc.)
Mention / @-tag support with dynamic list and custom id/label paths
Custom toolbar slot (customMenuElement) to replace the default menu

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Whether the editor is read-only.

properties.name: customMenu
properties.description: Replace the default toolbar with the customMenuElement slot.

properties.name: initialValue
properties.description: Initial value of the editor. Bound to the `value` variable.

properties.name: output
properties.description: Format of the value emitted by the editor.

properties.name: debounce
properties.description: Enable debounce on value changes.

properties.name: debounceDelay
properties.description: Debounce delay (e.g. '500ms'). Only used when debounce is true. Inactive when debounce is false.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Placeholder text displayed when the editor is empty.

properties.name: enableMention
properties.description: Enable @-mention support in the editor.

properties.name: mentionList
properties.description: Array of objects used to populate the mention suggestions. Typically bound to a collection. Inactive when enableMention is false.

properties.name: mentionIdPath
properties.description: Path (in each mentionList item) to the unique id of the mention. Inactive when enableMention is false, or mentionList is not bound, or its first item is not an object.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when enableMention is false, or mentionList is not bound (boundProps.mentionList is falsy), or the first mentionList item is not an object.

properties.name: mentionLabelPath
properties.description: Path (in each mentionList item) to the label displayed for the mention. Inactive when enableMention is false, or mentionList is not bound, or its first item is not an object.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when enableMention is false, or mentionList is not bound (boundProps.mentionList is falsy), or the first mentionList item is not an object.

properties.name: mentionAllowSpaces
properties.description: Allow spaces inside a mention query. Inactive when enableMention is false.

properties.name: mentionChar
properties.description: Character that triggers a mention suggestion. Inactive when enableMention is false.

properties.name: mentionListLength
properties.description: Number of mention suggestions shown in the dropdown (1-20). Inactive when enableMention is false.

properties.name: autofocus
properties.description: Focus the editor automatically on mount.

properties.name: editable
properties.description: Whether the editor content can be edited.

properties.name: hideMenu
properties.description: Hide the default toolbar entirely. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: wrapMenu
properties.description: Allow the toolbar to wrap onto multiple lines. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: menuColor
properties.description: Color of toolbar icons. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: menuHoverColor
properties.description: Color of toolbar icons on hover. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: menuBgColor
properties.description: Background color of toolbar buttons. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: menuHoverBgColor
properties.description: Background color of toolbar buttons on hover. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalBgColor
properties.description: Background color of editor modals (link, image, math, etc.). Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalTextColor
properties.description: Text color inside editor modals. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalPlaceholderColor
properties.description: Placeholder color inside editor modals. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalBorderColor
properties.description: Border color used inside editor modals. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalFontSize
properties.description: Font size inside editor modals. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalApplyBgColor
properties.description: Background color of the modal 'Apply' button. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalApplyColor
properties.description: Text color of the modal 'Apply' button. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalCancelBgColor
properties.description: Background color of the modal 'Cancel' button. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: modalCancelColor
properties.description: Text color of the modal 'Cancel' button. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: h1
properties.description: Styling options for h1 heading tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, textAlign, color, lineHeight, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: h2
properties.description: Styling options for h2 heading tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, textAlign, color, lineHeight, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: h3
properties.description: Styling options for h3 heading tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, textAlign, color, lineHeight, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: h4
properties.description: Styling options for h4 heading tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, textAlign, color, lineHeight, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: h5
properties.description: Styling options for h5 heading tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, textAlign, color, lineHeight, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: h6
properties.description: Styling options for h6 heading tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, textAlign, color, lineHeight, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: p
properties.description: Styling options for paragraph tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, textAlign, color, lineHeight, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: mention
properties.description: Styling options for mention tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, fontWeight, color, borderSize, borderRadius.

properties.name: a
properties.description: Styling options for link (anchor) tags inside the editor. Includes fontSize, fontFamily, color, isUnderline.

properties.name: blockquote
properties.description: Styling options for blockquote elements inside the editor. Includes color, borderColor, marginTop, marginBottom.

properties.name: code
properties.description: Styling options for code block elements inside the editor. Includes fontSize, color, bgColor, borderRadius, paddingX, paddingY.

properties.name: img
properties.description: Styling options for image elements inside the editor. Includes maxWidth, maxHeight, inline.

properties.name: checkbox
properties.description: Styling options for checkbox/task list items inside the editor. Includes accent color.

properties.name: table
properties.description: Styling options for table elements inside the editor. Includes borderColor, borderWidth, headerBgColor, headerColor, pairCellBgColor, oddCellBgColor, cellColor, cellPaddingY, cellPaddingX.

properties.name: parameterTextType
properties.description: Show the heading/paragraph type selector in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterBold
properties.description: Show the bold toggle in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterItalic
properties.description: Show the italic toggle in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterUnderline
properties.description: Show the underline toggle in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterStrike
properties.description: Show the strikethrough toggle in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterAlignLeft
properties.description: Show the align-left button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterAlignCenter
properties.description: Show the align-center button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterAlignRight
properties.description: Show the align-right button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterAlignJustify
properties.description: Show the justify button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterTextColor
properties.description: Show the text-color picker in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterBulletList
properties.description: Show the bullet-list button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterOrderedList
properties.description: Show the ordered-list button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterTaskList
properties.description: Show the task-list (checkbox list) button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterTable
properties.description: Show the table button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterLink
properties.description: Show the link button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterImage
properties.description: Show the image button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterCodeBlock

properties.name: parameterQuote
properties.description: Show the blockquote button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterInlineMath
properties.description: Show the inline-math button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterBlockMath
properties.description: Show the block-math button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterUndo
properties.description: Show the undo button in the toolbar. Inactive when customMenu is true.

properties.name: parameterRedo

properties.name: fieldName
properties.description: Field name used for form data when inside a ww-form-container. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: customValidation
properties.description: Enable custom validation formula. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: validation
properties.description: Custom validation formula (must evaluate to a truthy value for the input to be valid). Inactive when the element is not in a form container or when customValidation is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy) or when customValidation is false.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when the editor content changes.

events.name: initValueChange
events.description: Triggered when the bound initial value changes.

events.name: mention:click
events.description: Triggered when the user clicks on a rendered mention.

events.name: focus
events.description: Triggered when the editor receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Triggered when the editor loses focus.

actions.label: Focus Rich text
actions.description: Programmatically focus the editor.

actions.description: Wrap the current selection in a link.

actions.label: Set Image
actions.description: Insert an image at the current cursor position.

actions.label: Set Tag
actions.description: Set the block tag of the current selection.

args.name: tag
args.description: Target tag: p, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5 or h6.

actions.label: Toggle Bold
actions.description: Toggle bold on the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Italic
actions.description: Toggle italic on the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Underline
actions.description: Toggle underline on the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Strike
actions.description: Toggle strikethrough on the current selection.

actions.label: Set Text Align
actions.description: Set the text alignment of the current block.

args.name: align
args.description: Alignment: left, center, right or justify.

actions.label: Set Color
actions.description: Set the text color of the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Bullet List
actions.description: Toggle a bullet list on the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Ordered List
actions.description: Toggle an ordered list on the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Check List
actions.description: Toggle a task (checkbox) list on the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Code Block
actions.description: Toggle a code block on the current selection.

actions.label: Toggle Blockquote
actions.description: Toggle a blockquote on the current selection.

actions.label: Insert Inline Math
actions.description: Insert an inline math expression.

actions.label: Insert Block Math
actions.description: Insert a block math expression.

actions.label: Undo
actions.description: Undo the last editor action.

actions.label: Redo
actions.description: Redo the last undone editor action.

actions.label: Insert Table
actions.description: Insert a table at the current cursor position.

actions.label: Insert Row
actions.description: Insert a row relative to the current cell.

args.name: position
args.description: Where to insert: before or after.

actions.label: Insert Column
actions.description: Insert a column relative to the current cell.

args.name: position
args.description: Where to insert: before or after.

actions.label: Delete Row
actions.description: Delete the current row.

actions.label: Delete Column
actions.description: Delete the current column.

actions.label: Delete Table
actions.description: Delete the current table.

slots.name: customMenuElement
slots.description: Element rendered in place of the default toolbar when customMenu is true.

variables.name: value
variables.description: Current content of the editor (HTML or Markdown depending on `output`).

variables.name: mentions
variables.description: Array of mentions currently present in the editor content.

variables.name: states
variables.description: Internal editor state snapshot (active marks, active node, etc.).

specifications: Default output is HTML; set `output` to 'markdown' to emit Markdown instead.
`initialValue` is the bound model (exposed to the AI as `value` via wewebName). The live value is available through the `value` variable.
When used inside a ww-form-container, set a unique `fieldName` so the submitted payload includes this field.
`readonly` disables editing while keeping the content visible and continues to emit the `readonly` state.
Mention support requires `enableMention: true` plus `mentionList`, `mentionIdPath` and `mentionLabelPath`.

Toolbar buttons are controlled individually by the `parameter*` boolean flags. Set `hideMenu: true` to hide the toolbar entirely, or `customMenu: true` with the `customMenuElement` slot to provide a completely custom toolbar.
Do not store the editor value in a separate variable — bind directly to the `value` variable.
